mnemonics: FAST: Faster systems Amplify energy Strain, requiring Thoughtful design
keyPoints: Increased processing speed requires more energy, creating a larger carbon footprint.
Higher reliability expectations (e.g., 99.999% uptime) necessitate redundant systems that consume significant power.
The environmental cost of constant hardware upgrades for performance is often overlooked.
commonMistakes: Assuming that digital efficiency automatically equals energy efficiency.
Focusing solely on speed and uptime without considering their environmental impact.
Believing cloud services are inherently 'green' despite the massive, energy-hungry data centers that power them.
